Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk

Class FixedIncomePricing

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.FixedIncomePricing
All Implemented Interfaces:
SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallOrderPriceServicePreviewOrderCost, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallOrderPriceServiceRetrieveFixedIncomeMarks, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallOrderPriceServiceRetrieveQuote
public class FixedIncomePricing extends Object implements SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallOrderPriceServicePreviewOrderCost, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallOrderPriceServiceRetrieveQuote, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallOrderPriceServiceRetrieveFixedIncomeMarks

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OrderPriceServicePreviewOrderCostRequestBuilder
    previewOrderCost()
    Preview Order Cost Returns a calculation estimating the costs involved in ordering a given quantity of a Fixed Income asset at a specified limit price.
    OrderPriceServicePreviewOrderCostResponse
    previewOrderCost(String accountId, OrderCostPreviewRequestCreate orderCostPreviewRequestCreate)
    Preview Order Cost Returns a calculation estimating the costs involved in ordering a given quantity of a Fixed Income asset at a specified limit price.
    OrderPriceServiceRetrieveFixedIncomeMarksRequestBuilder
    retrieveFixedIncomeMarks()
    Retrieve Fixed Income Marks Returns marks for a specified set of Fixed Income assets (up to 100 per request)
    OrderPriceServiceRetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponse
    retrieveFixedIncomeMarks(String correspondentId, RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksRequestCreate retrieveFixedIncomeMarksRequestCreate)
    Retrieve Fixed Income Marks Returns marks for a specified set of Fixed Income assets (up to 100 per request)
    OrderPriceServiceRetrieveQuoteRequestBuilder
    retrieveQuote()
    Retrieve Quote Returns quote information containing the best bid/ask for the given Fixed Income asset.
    OrderPriceServiceRetrieveQuoteResponse

    Retrieve Quote Returns quote information containing the best bid/ask for the given Fixed Income asset.
